messages.meaning: bgpcfgd failed to render a Jinja2 template for FRR configuration
likely_causes: Invalid or missing fields in CONFIG_DB BGP tables
Custom template modification broke Jinja2 syntax
bgpcfgd code bug after SONiC upgrade
next_steps: Check CONFIG_DB BGP entries: redis-cli -n 4 KEYS 'BGP_*'
Check bgpcfgd logs: journalctl -u bgp | grep bgpcfgd | tail -30

messages.meaning: bgpcfgd's vtysh command to configure FRR was rejected
likely_causes: Syntax error in generated vtysh command
FRR is not running or crashed
next_steps: Check FRR status: docker exec bgp supervisorctl status
Try the vtysh command manually: docker exec bgp vtysh -c '<command>'
Check FRR log: docker exec bgp cat /var/log/frr/bgpd.log | tail -30

messages.meaning: bgpcfgd detected a CONFIG_DB change and is syncing to FRR
likely_causes: Normal operation -- user made a config change via CLI/API
next_steps: Usually informational -- verify the change took effect in FRR: docker exec bgp vtysh -c 'show running-config'
